rulings.Case Title: ZFC CONCEPTS, LLC DBA SLOANE, A CALIFORNIA VS. 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 12, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is denied as to the HOA, the complaint sufficiently allege HOA's duty to maintain and repair the property. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the individual members for cross-complaint to allege basis of liability. Cross-complaint may also add allegations regarding the incomplete construction so long as this is done in good faith and new allegations are not a sham. = (501/REQ)
